ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "stall_no" INTEGER /* Stall number where the product is located */,
  "instock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  "market_category" INTEGER /* Market category identifier for the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* ID of the supplier providing the product */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Fashion, Technology) */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Quality grade of the product (0-5 scale) */,
  "demand" INTEGER /* Demand level of the product (0-100 scale) */,
  "discount_avail" INTEGER /* Indicates if a discount is available (1 for Yes, 0 for No) */,
  "charges_1" REAL /* Charge associated with the product */,
  "charges_2_percent" REAL /* Additional charges as a percentage */,
  "minimum_price" REAL /* Minimum selling price of the product */,
  "maximum_price" REAL /* Maximum selling price of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "last_sold_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last sold */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of customer reviews for the product */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of any current promotion */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of any current promotion */,
  "promotion_discount" REAL /* Discount percentage during the promotion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_status" TEXT /* Loyalty status of the customer (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the loyalty program */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase by the customer */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 scale) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id")
)
